passedAssertions.evidence: RESEARCH.md exists at repo root with 2400+ lines covering all required areas: Hardware Characterization (PCIe 4.0 x16, 2-hop topology, BAR1 P2P), P2P Allreduce Optimization (v1/v2 kernel analysis, ~79us latency), Double-Buffer Pipeline Overlap (implementation and 9.3% degradation root cause), AWQ Model Integration (format detection, kernel variant), Deferred Attention Allreduce (halved AR count from 128 to 64), Persistent Megakernel Attempt (architecture and limitations), Benchmark Results Summary (51.72 tok/s final, sprint reports), Current Bottleneck Analysis (GPU compute 42%, allreduce 19%), Open Questions (5 detailed questions with hypotheses), and Cross-Validation/Lessons Learned. Contains all key numerical findings: 51.72 tok/s, 79us allreduce, PCIe 4.0 x16, 3.38x speedup, etc.

README.md line 19 contains: 'Comprehensive research, optimization attempts, and benchmark results are documented in [RESEARCH.md](RESEARCH.md). This includes detailed analysis of all optimizations, failed attempts, and bottleneck analysis.'

testingApproach: Documentation validation - file existence and content verification. No GPU testing required for this milestone as assertions are purely documentation-based.
